page_metadata.biotools__summary: Reads sequence, qualities and clip point values from sff files generated by Roche 454 and Life Sciences Ion Torrent sequencers into similar classes as are present for fastq files.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Reads sequence, qualities and clip point values from sff files generated by Roche 454 and Life Sciences Ion Torrent sequencers into similar classes as are present for fastq files.
